description: SpiderFoot: An incredibly comprehensive OSINT automation engine designed to rapidly integrate over 200 different modules bridging black-box footprints.

commands.explanation: Boots a terminal-only CLI automation loop exclusively scanning the defined target with standard modules natively.
Deploys a robust local HTTP dashboard web server enabling highly visual graphical configuration mapping.
Bypasses overall mass scanning explicitly restricting execution ONLY to the specified programmatic modules.
Executes the scan extremely rapidly without stdout spam (-q), strictly enforcing deep brute-force analysis directives (-F).
Automates API authentication parameters bridging customized module rules directly from a local configuration artifact.
Dumps the absolute aggregated OSINT analytical results explicitly formatting them as native raw JSON, CSV, or GEXF.
Drops into a passive interactive CLI explicitly utilized for tracking the internal status of asynchronously running background scans.
Deletes incredibly massive internal local sql caches completely erasing historical execution data associated with the Target ID.
Forces the entire python request architecture explicitly through an active TOR/SOCKS proxy layer.
Strictly defines the data-type format (IP, Domain, Email, User) preventing the internal engines from guessing the baseline target type.
